description: Shoebox v2 scene for RLR-vs-GPURIR spike (2026-07-07). Room deepened to 6.0m along Y to leave room for husky 4-segment detour around sofa. All backends (SPEAR/UE + GPURIR, SPEAR/UE + RLR swap-in, Habitat + RLR) read this file as SSOT.

coordinate_frame.system: right-handed Y-up (meters). Origin at room corner (X=0, Y=0, Z=0=floor).
coordinate_frame.notes: UE side must convert to Z-up left-handed cm. Habitat side ingests as-is.

furniture.name: sofa
furniture.notes: Long edge along X. Occupies X:[1.6,3.6] Y:[4.00,4.90] Z:[0,0.9]. Sofa pushed +1m Y (deeper into room) so husky loop is fully visible in camera FOV.

sources.notes: Behind camera (Y=0.9 < mic Y=2.2, 1.3m behind camera). Uniform L to R across camera-back to test spatial audio azimuth. Pushed further from camera to make husky more visible in front FOV.

6-segment full loop around sofa, returning to start. Husky orbits: right → back-right → across-behind-sofa (occluded mid-loop) → back-left → left → return to front-center. All positions pushed +1m Y (loop closer to back wall) so full loop is visible in front-view camera without cropping. Nearest husky point to mic = 1.3m (Y=3.5).

occlusion_event.notes: During segments C+D husky is behind sofa. RLR should show ≥3dB energy drop between mean(t=2.0-3.0s occluded) vs mean(t=0-1.5s pre-occlusion). GPURIR should show ~0dB change (no occlusion modeling).
